projects.name: MindMate
projects.description: MindMate is a mobile app geared towards helping college students stay on top of their mental health. It does this with mood tracking, task management, breathing exercises, and focus timers. It is built in a React-Native environment.

projects.name: Resume Website
projects.description: This is a website I created to display my resume and portfolio. It is built in a HTML and CSS environment. You're on this website right now!
